description.ko: 복잡한 오디오 주파수를 생생하고 빛나는 기하학적 패턴과 천상의 파동으로 변환하는 ECHO-0의 고급 시각화 시스템입니다.
description.en: An advanced visualization system for ECHO-0 that transforms complex audio frequencies into vibrant, glowing geometric patterns and ethereal pulses.

prompt: A cinematic digital interface of ECHO-0 visualizing sound waves, intricate neon blue and violet audio spectrums, 3D geometric waveforms pulsing in a dark void, floating light particles, futuristic HUD design, hyper-detailed digital art, 8k resolution, synthwave aesthetic.
